noPermissionAccess: You don't have permission to access this
sessionExpiredLoginAgain: Your session has expired. Please login again.

detail.dangerZoneDesc: The actions below will directly affect user access and system data.
detail.lockAccountDesc: Temporarily block access. User can unlock when needed.
detail.softDeleteDesc: Mark for deletion. Data is kept for 30 days for recovery.
detail.hardDeleteDesc: Permanently remove user and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

warnings.adminWarningDesc: Sensitive actions have been disabled to protect the Administrator account.

lock.title: Lock User Account
lock.selectReason: Select a reason for locking this account
lock.otherReasonDesc: Please provide a detailed reason for locking this account.
lock.otherReasonPlaceholder: Enter the specific reason for locking this account...
lock.otherReasonHint: This reason will be recorded in the system.
lock.autoUnlockDateHint: Account will automatically unlock on this date
lock.sendEmailDescription: Notify user of account lock via email
lock.logoutSessionDescription: Force logout user from all active sessions
lock.confirmMessage: You are about to lock this user account. Review details below.
lock.successMessage: The user account has been locked
lock.successDescription: User will be unable to login until account is unlocked
lock.errorDescription: An error occurred while locking the account
lock.errorCannotLockYourselfDescription: You cannot lock your own account. Please contact another administrator for assistance.
lock.errorInsufficientPermissionDescription: You do not have permission to lock this account.
lock.errorGeneral: An error occurred while locking the account
lock.successLockUser: User account has been locked successfully

unlock.title: Unlock User Account
unlock.description: Unlock a locked user account and restore access
unlock.sendEmailDescription: Notify user of account unlock via email
unlock.requirePasswordChangeDescription: Force user to change password on next login
unlock.securityNoticeDescription: Email notification will only contain login link, no temporary passwords
unlock.confirmMessage: You are about to unlock this user account. Review details below.
unlock.successMessage: The user account has been unlocked
unlock.successDescription: User can now login. If password change was required, they will be prompted on next login.
unlock.errorDescription: An error occurred while unlocking the account
unlock.errorGeneral: An error occurred while unlocking the account
unlock.successUnlockUser: User account has been unlocked successfully

delete.title: Delete User
delete.selectMethod: Select a deletion method for this user account
delete.softDeleteDesc: Mark the account as deleted. Data will be retained for recovery.
delete.softDeleteReasonDesc: Please provide a reason for soft deleting this account.
delete.reasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for soft deletion (e.g., Account inactive, User request, Policy violation)...
delete.reasonHint: This reason will be recorded in the audit log.
delete.reasonRequired: Reason is required for soft delete
delete.errorReasonRequired: Please provide a reason before proceeding
delete.softDeleteBenefit2: Data kept for 30 days for recovery
delete.softDeleteBenefit3: Can be restored by Admin if needed
delete.hardDeleteDesc: Permanently remove all user data from the system.
delete.usesSoftDeleteInstead: This user has related data. Please use Soft Delete instead.
delete.hardDeleteWarning2: All associated data will be permanently deleted
delete.confirmSoftDelete: You are about to soft delete this account. The account will be locked and data will be kept for 30 days.
delete.confirmHardDelete: ⚠️ You are about to permanently delete this account. This CANNOT be undone!
delete.successSoftMessage: The account has been marked for deletion. Data will be retained for 30 days and can be recovered if needed.
delete.successHardMessage: The account and all its associated data have been permanently removed from the system.
delete.contactSupport: Please contact support if the problem persists.
delete.conflictMessage: This account has related data that must be handled before hard deletion.
delete.conflictResolution: Please use Soft Delete to lock this account while keeping the related data intact.
delete.errorConflict: User has related data. Please use Soft Delete instead

classification.roleDescription: Group users by their organizational role
classification.statusDescription: Group users by their account status
classification.companyDescription: Group users by their company affiliation
classification.createdMonthDescription: Group users by their registration month
